code:
import io
import string
import list

let input = io.read_to_end()
let n = string.len(input)

mut starts: List<Int> = []
mut ends: List<Int> = []
mut i = 0
while i < n
  match string.byte_at(input, i)
  when Some(b)
    if b == 32 or b == 9 or b == 10 or b == 13
      i = i + 1
    else
      let s = i
      mut j = i
      mut running = true
      while running
        if j >= n
          running = false
        else
          match string.byte_at(input, j)
          when Some(c)
            if c == 32 or c == 9 or c == 10 or c == 13
              running = false
            else
              j = j + 1
            end
          when None
            running = false
          end
        end
      end
      starts = list.push(starts, s)
      ends = list.push(ends, j)
      i = j
    end
  when None
    i = i + 1
  end
end

let tcount = starts.len()
mut best_idx = 0
mut best_count = 0
mut k = 0
while k < tcount
  let sk = starts[k]
  let ek = ends[k]
  let tok_k = string.substring(input, sk, ek)
  mut first = true
  mut j = 0
  while j < k
    let tok_j = string.substring(input, starts[j], ends[j])
    if tok_k == tok_j
      first = false
    end
    j = j + 1
  end
  if first
    mut cnt = 0
    mut m = 0
    while m < tcount
      let tok_m = string.substring(input, starts[m], ends[m])
      if tok_m == tok_k
        cnt = cnt + 1
      end
      m = m + 1
    end
    if cnt > best_count
      best_count = cnt
      best_idx = k
    end
  end
  k = k + 1
end

if tcount > 0
  let top = string.substring(input, starts[best_idx], ends[best_idx])
  println("top=#{top}=#{best_count}")
else
  println("top==0")
end
